slide1.title: We build digital products that stay clean as they grow.
slide1.description: From frontend to backend and web design, we create websites and systems that are clear, maintainable and built for real use.

slide2.title: Good products need more than development alone.
slide2.description: We combine visual design, frontend execution and backend structure to build products that feel solid from the start.

slide3.title: Frontend, backend and web design working together.
slide3.description: We create websites and digital experiences that look sharp, work fast and remain easy to scale.

about.title: A small team that builds digital products properly from the start.
about.text1: We focus on websites and systems that do not fall apart as they grow. Instead of rushing into code, we think through structure, interface and long-term maintainability.
about.text2: Our strength is the combination of visual thinking, frontend execution and backend discipline. We care about clean architecture, clarity and products that stay stable over time.

craft.title: Design thinking
craft.description: We think beyond visuals — focusing on structure, hierarchy and user flow.

delivery.title: Clean execution
delivery.description: We build interfaces and systems that are readable, structured and easy to maintain.

stack.title: Built to scale
stack.description: We create digital products that grow without turning into technical debt.

services.title: Frontend, backend and web design working together.
services.subtitle: We combine structure, interface and visual design to build products that look clear, work fast and stay maintainable.

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.description: Responsive, clean interfaces built for real products, not just mockups.

backend.title: Backend
backend.description: Structured APIs and backend systems designed for stability and scalability.

webDesign.title: Web Design
webDesign.description: Visual direction, layout and UX focused on clarity, hierarchy and strong digital presence.

technologies.title: Built with proven technologies
technologies.description: We use reliable tools that support scalability, clean architecture and long-term maintainability.

typescript.title: TypeScript
typescript.paragraph1: TypeScript helps keep code predictable and easier to maintain as systems grow.
typescript.paragraph2: It allows teams to understand structure and data flow more clearly.
typescript.paragraph3: We use it to build reliable frontend and backend systems.
typescript.paragraph4: It improves confidence when evolving the product.

angular.title: Next.js
angular.paragraph1: Next.js helps build fast and scalable web applications.
angular.paragraph2: It supports modern frontend architecture and server rendering.
angular.paragraph3: Great for websites, SaaS products and high-performance interfaces.
angular.paragraph4: It improves SEO, routing and production workflows.
angular.paragraph5: A strong choice for modern frontend development.

react.title: React
react.paragraph1: React allows fast iteration and modular UI.
react.paragraph2: Strong ecosystem for building modern interfaces.
react.paragraph3: Used for SaaS, landing pages and apps.

reactNative.title: React Native
reactNative.paragraph1: Build mobile apps from one codebase.

next.title: WordPress
next.paragraph1: WordPress is practical for websites that need easy content management.
next.paragraph2: It works well for company sites, landing pages and editorial platforms.
next.paragraph3: It allows fast publishing and simple admin workflows.
next.paragraph4: It can be extended with custom themes and integrations.
next.paragraph5: A reliable option for scalable content-based projects.

portfolio.title: Examples of what we build
portfolio.description: Three core areas: frontend, backend and web design.

crm.title: Frontend
crm.description: User interfaces, dashboards and client-facing applications.

platform.title: Backend
platform.description: APIs, system logic and server-side architecture.

mobile.title: Web Design
mobile.description: Visual design, layouts and product presentation.

contact.title: Tell us what you’re building
contact.description: Share your product or idea — we’ll suggest the most practical next step.
contact.name: Your name
